meaning: n.[植]芹叶钩吻,从芹叶钩吻制取的毒药
examples: A dark wall of trees—red spruce, balsam fir, beech, hemlock—surrounds you.
Even with snow on the ground, the high bushy understory is exposed; also snow and wind bring down leafy branches of cedar, hemlock, red alder, and other arboreal fodder.
By sucking sap from the young twigs of the hemlock tree, tree growth is retarded by the woolly adelgid, causing needles to change color from deep green to grayish green and to drop prematurely.
Some of the examples include House of Cards, Lillyhammer, Hemlock Grove and Arrested Development.
Hemlock Hardware in Fairfield did a brisk business on shovels, batteries, firewood, salt, sand and sleds.
